chunks.text: Diane Greene makes Americas 50 - EECS at Berkeley CS alumnus Diane Greene (M.S. ’88), the CEO of Google Cloud, has been named to Data Economy’s list of Americas 50: The world’s first top 50 North, Central and South American influencers. The list highlights “personalities who are leading data centres, cloud, edge computing and data through charting new innovations or technological breakthroughs, sheer investment or business acumen, or exceptional entrepreneurial skillsets.” Categories Alumni Honors Industry View Open Faculty Positions
